sizing_rule.note: Risk 1% per trade (acceptable_loss_per_trade_pct). Only take trades where expected profit ≥ 4× stop loss distance (profit_to_loss_ratio_minimum). Use 2.0 ATR multiples for stop placement to avoid whipsaw while maintaining acceptable transaction cost ratio of 0.1.

source_rule_text: A trader should set stop losses wide enough to avoid being whipsawed by normal market noise while keeping total transaction costs (slippage, commissions, and losses) proportional to expected profits, because tight stops increase the frequency of small losses and transaction costs that can exceed net profitability over time.
